label: Manganese

source_notes: Estimated. -- Manganese content typically ranges from 35% to 54% for manganese ore and from 74% to 95% for ferromanganese. -- Defined for 2021–22 as imports – exports ± adjustments for Government and industry stock changes. Beginning in 2023, Government stock changes no longer included.
